-- 20 of 40 --

Basic Internet Marketing
Terminology Continued…
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 21 of 40 --

AFFILIATE MARKETING
Your online team of salesmen! You can start as an affiliate
to learn the ropes, BUT real wealth and success really
happens when you start selling your own products!
Recruit affiliates carefully!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 22 of 40 --

AFFILIATE AND CPA NETWORKS
Affiliate marketplaces where affiliates go to find products
to promote. The network takes a small commission of the
sale. CPA networks are similar to affiliate marketplaces,
except here you can earn commission for the sale of
physical products and are usually paid for actions, not
sales!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 23 of 40 --

LEADS
A brand new entry in to your sales funnel!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 24 of 40 --

EMAIL LISTS
A list of prospects and customers. The life-blood of your
business!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 25 of 40 --

CONVERSIONS
A specific action or goal, expressed as a percentage of the
number of clicks to your funnel page!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 26 of 40 --

UPSELL / DOWNSELL
A strategy to immediately increase the value of each
customer. Lifetime Customer Value is your most important
customer metric!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 27 of 40 --

IMPRESSIONS
The number of times your advertisement has been loaded
or served on to a webpage, irrespective of whether it is
above or below the fold!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 28 of 40 --

ABOVE/BELOW THE FOLD
Above-the-fold placement required no scrolling to be
immediately seen by the visitor. Below-the-fold placement
will not be seen without the visitor scrolling down the
webpage!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 29 of 40 --

TRAFFIC SOURCES (PAID AND ORGANIC)
Website visitors. Organic or Purchased!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 30 of 40 --

SALES FUNNELS
A sales sequence especially designed to increase
conversions and increase the value of every site visitor!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 31 of 40 --

www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 32 of 40 --

Advanced Internet Marketing
Terminology
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 33 of 40 --

Ratio comparing the number of visitors who
have seen your advertisement against the
number who have clicked that same
advertisement. Expressed as a percentage.
Click-Through Rates www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 34 of 40 --

Raw clicks are counted each time your ad is
clicked! Unique clicks are only counted once a
unique IP address clicks your ad within a 24
hour period! Use unique clicks when
determining your EPC.
Raw Clicks/Unique Clicks
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 35 of 40 --

A link generated for you as an affiliate. Links
directly to an advertiser’s sales funnel. Beware
of network policies!
Direct/Affiliate Links www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 36 of 40 --

A unique link you can and should use to track
the performance of particular traffic sources
and marketing efforts!
Tracking Links www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 37 of 40 --

A comparative tool aimed at increasing
conversions throughout your sales funnel!
Split Tests www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 38 of 40 --

IMPORTANT! A limit on the number of times a
visitor will see your advertisement (3-5
recommended). If you are buying ad space on a
CPM basis, Frequency Cap is everything! If ads
are being purchased on a CPC basis, Frequency
Cap becomes less relevant.
Frequency Caps www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 39 of 40 --

TEST YOURSELF

Marketing Terms
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
